name: Kilómetro 88
context: Gold-mining town in Bolívar state, Venezuela (Km 88); illegal mining / garimpeiro economy. No enwiki page -> re-ground to 'Gold mining in Brazil'/Bolívar/Orinoco Mining Arc citable sources.

name: Rafael Rojas
context: Former PDVSA trader; alleged 'Petro espías' insider-information case feeding Marc Rich (trader); allegedly tied to Rafael Ramírez (ex-PDVSA president, Q2127006). No enwiki page -> re-ground to PDVSA/Rafael Ramírez/Marc Rich citable bios + any DOJ/OFAC action.

name: Marcelo Blanco
context: Argentine; former Deutsche Bank executive, later a multilateral (Washington DC) role. No clear enwiki page -> discovery lead for finance/sanctions chains; re-ground to Deutsche Bank/IMF/World Bank citable text.
